examples: AD 132. Zhang Heng created the seismograph, the armillary sphere, and the south-pointing chariot (compass).
Liang was a palace scholar in Kaiyuan era, Tang Dynasty. He has invented the armillary sphere in cooperation with bonze Yixing. He was both a scholar and an artist.
The dragon has appeared on Chinese artifacts throughout the ages. This is the model of a fake Sung armillary sphere on display in the Taichung Natural Science Museum.
